info.title: PurviewDataEstateHealth
info.description: Creates a data plane client for Purview Data Estate Health.

id.description: The unique identifier of the action.

filters.description: Filters to apply when computing facets.

ActionGroupedRequest.description: Request to query actions grouped by a field.

filters.description: Filters to apply to the grouped action query.

groupBy.description: The field to group actions by.

ActionQueryRequest.description: Request to query actions with pagination and filters.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token from a previous response.

pageSize.description: The number of results per page.

filters.description: Filters to apply to the action query.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token for the next page of results.

id.description: The unique identifier of the assessment.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token for the next page of results.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

id.description: The unique identifier of the control.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token for the next page of results.

CreateTimeRangeFilter.description: Time range filter for action creation time.

jobId.description: The unique identifier of the job.

errorMessage.description: Error message if the job failed.

timeStamp.description: The timestamp of the log entry.

DHAnalyticsScheduleRequest.description: Request to create or update an analytics schedule.

frequency.description: The frequency of the analytics schedule.

startTime.description: The start time of the schedule.

endTime.description: The end time of the schedule.

timeZone.description: The time zone for the schedule.

DHScoreAggregated.description: Score data aggregated by control or control group. The shape of items depends on the `type` query parameter used in the request: when `type=ControlNode`, `controlId` and `computingJobId` are populated; when `type=ControlGroup`, those fields are omitted.

controlId.description: The control ID. Present only when the query was issued with `type=ControlNode`.

computingJobId.description: The computing job ID. Present only when the query was issued with `type=ControlNode`.

DataSourceType.description: Supported data source types for managed private endpoints.

values.name: ADLSGen2
values.description: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 data source.

FacetRequestObject.description: A facet request object specifying which facets to retrieve.

facets.description: A dictionary of facet name to facet values with counts.

FacetResponseObject.description: A single facet value with its count.

count.description: The count of items matching this facet value.

GroupedActions.description: A group of actions under a common grouping key.

items.description: The action items in this group.

ManagedPrivateEndpointExistsResponse.description: Response indicating whether a managed private endpoint exists.

mpeStatus.description: The status of the managed private endpoint.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target resource.

ManagedPrivateEndpointRequest.description: Request to check or create a managed private endpoint.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target resource.

NetworkProperties.description: Network properties including managed private endpoint information.

isManagedVnetEnabled.description: Whether managed virtual network is enabled.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target resource.

mpeStatus.description: The status of the managed private endpoint.

markedForDeletion.description: Whether the endpoint is marked for deletion.

field.description: The field name to order by.

QueryScoresRequest.description: Unified request for querying scores. When type=ControlNode, provide controlIds. When type=ControlGroup, provide controlGroupIds.

recordLatestCounts.description: Number of latest score records to return.

controlIds.description: The control IDs to query scores for. Required when type=ControlNode.

controlGroupIds.description: The control group IDs to query scores for. Required when type=ControlGroup.

start.description: The start of the time range.

end.description: The end of the time range.

StorageConfig.description: Storage configuration for Purview Data Estate Health.

id.description: Unique identifier of the storage configuration.

type.description: Type of storage backing this configuration.

systemData.description: System data envelope for the storage configuration.

typeProperties.description: Type-specific properties whose shape depends on the storage `type`.

networkProperties.description: Network properties associated with the storage configuration.

StorageConfigConnectivityResult.description: Result of a storage configuration connectivity test.

succeeded.description: Whether the connectivity test was successful.

message.description: Diagnostic message describing the connectivity test outcome. Empty string when the test succeeded.

StorageConfigNetworkProperties.description: Network properties associated with a storage configuration, including managed virtual network and managed private endpoint information.

isManagedVnetEnabled.description: Whether managed virtual network is enabled for this storage configuration.

targetResourceId.description: The Azure resource ID of the target storage resource.

mpeStatus.description: The status of the managed private endpoint. Possible values include `Approved`, `Rejected`, `Pending`, `Provisioning`, or an empty string when no endpoint exists.

markedForDeletion.description: Whether the managed private endpoint is marked for deletion.

StorageConfigTypeProperties.description:
Type-specific properties for the storage configuration. The actual fields
populated depend on the parent StorageConfig.type: `locationURL` is set when
type is `Fabric`; `endpoint` is set when type is `ADLSGen2`.

locationURL.description: Fabric workspace location URL. Required when StorageConfig.type is `Fabric`.

endpoint.description: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 endpoint URL. Required when StorageConfig.type is `ADLSGen2`.

StorageConfigUpdate.description: Partial storage configuration payload used when updating the configuration or testing its connectivity. All properties are optional so callers can supply only the fields they want to change or validate.

id.description: Unique identifier of the storage configuration.

type.description: Type of storage backing this configuration.

systemData.description: System data envelope for the storage configuration.

typeProperties.description: Type-specific properties whose shape depends on the storage `type`.

networkProperties.description: Network properties associated with the storage configuration.

StorageStatus.description: Status of a Purview Data Estate Health storage configuration.

StorageType.description: Type of storage backing a Purview Data Estate Health storage configuration.

values.name: ADLSGen2
values.description: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 storage.

createdBy.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the resource.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the resource was created.

lastModifiedBy.description: The unique identifier of the user who last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the resource was last modified.

Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.name: api-version
Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.description: The API version to use for this operation.
